metadata.name: Portainer
metadata.description: Web-based management UI for Docker and Kubernetes environments. Simplifies container, image, network, and volume management through an intuitive interface.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Web-based management UI for Docker and Kubernetes environments. Simplifies container, image, network, and volume management through an intuitive interface.

## How to Use
This template renders `compose.yaml` as a file.

1. Decide on stack naming, networking, ports, persistent storage, and optional placement before rendering the stack.
2. Fill in required service settings first, then enable optional integrations such as Traefik only when needed.
3. Render the stack files, review placement and data persistence, and deploy them with Docker Swarm in the target environment.

## Variable Guide
### General
- `service_name`: Service Name; optional; default: portainer.
- `container_timezone`: Container Timezone; optional.
- `swarm_placement_host`: Target hostname for placement constraint; optional.

### Ports
- `ports_http`: Ports Http; optional; default: 9000.
- `ports_https`: Ports Https; optional; default: 9443.
- `ports_edge`: Host port for Edge agent (8000); required; default: 8000.

### Traefik
- `traefik_host`: Traefik Host; optional; default: portainer.
- `traefik_network`: Traefik Network; required; default: traefik.
- `traefik_domain`: Traefik Domain; required; default: home.arpa.
- `traefik_enabled`: Enable Traefik integration; optional; default: false.

### Traefik TLS
- `traefik_tls_certresolver`: Traefik Tls Certresolver; required; default: cloudflare.
- `traefik_tls_enabled`: Enable Traefik TLS; optional; default: false.

### Volume
- `volume_mode`: Volume Mode; required; default: local; options: local, mount, nfs.
- `volume_mount_path`: Volume Mount Path; required; default: /path/to/storage; shown when: volume_mode=mount.
- `volume_nfs_server`: Volume Nfs Server; required; default: 192.0.2.1; shown when: volume_mode=nfs.
- `volume_nfs_path`: Volume Nfs Path; required; default: /path/to/export; shown when: volume_mode=nfs.
- `volume_nfs_options`: Volume Nfs Options; required; default: rw,nolock,soft; shown when: volume_mode=nfs.

## References
- [Portainer](https://www.portainer.io/)
- [Documentation](https://docs.portainer.io/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/portainer/portainer)

variables.name: volume_mount_path
variables.title: Volume Mount Path
variables.description: Mount path used for the volume.

variables.name: volume_nfs_server
variables.title: Volume Nfs Server
variables.description: Hostname or IP address of the NFS server.

variables.name: volume_nfs_path
variables.title: Volume Nfs Path
variables.description: Export path on the NFS server.

variables.name: volume_nfs_options
variables.title: Volume Nfs Options
variables.description: Mount options for the NFS volume.
